Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave For Defendant Archimedes Banya Sf, Llc, Mikahil Brodky, And Banya 200, Llc'S Motion To File A Second Amended Answer To Plaintiff'S Unverified Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Carmen S. Gutman; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Apr-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ARCHIMEDES BANYA SF, LLC, MIKAHIL BRODSKY, BANYA 2000 LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A Second Amended Answer To Plaintiff'S Unverified Complaint

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS ARCHIMEDES BANYA SF, LLC, MIKAHIL BRODSKY, BANYA 2000 LLC'S Motion For Leave To File A Second Amended Answer To Plaintiff'S Unverified Complaint as follows:

The unopposed motion is granted. The new Answer must be filed by April 21, 2023.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and submit it to Department 302.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/CK)
